summary: Comprehensive testing of FinTres Pro reminder settings feature completed. All backend APIs (GET/POST /api/settings/reminders, GET /api/settings/scheduler-status, POST /api/smtp/send-reminders) working correctly. APScheduler integration verified - scheduler activates/deactivates based on is_scheduler_active setting. Frontend UI shows all 4 tabs (Profil, Kullanicilar, E-posta Ayarlari, Hatirlatma Ayarlari) with proper form elements and functionality.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when SMTP credentials are invalid (expected behavior with fake test credentials)

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - charts render but show warning in console. This is a pre-existing issue.

passed_tests: GET /api/settings/reminders returns default or saved reminder settings
GET /api/settings/scheduler-status returns is_running, has_job, next_run, send_time
Saving reminder settings with is_scheduler_active=false removes the scheduler job
Saving reminder settings with is_scheduler_active=true adds the scheduler job back
Settings page has 4 tabs: Profil, Kullanicilar, E-posta Ayarlari, Hatirlatma Ayarlari
Hatirlatma Ayarlari tab shows scheduler status (Aktif/Pasif, next run time, send time 08:00)
Hatirlatma Ayarlari tab has days_before input field (default 7)
Hatirlatma Ayarlari tab has send_on_due_date toggle
Hatirlatma Ayarlari tab has is_scheduler_active toggle
Hatirlatma Ayarlari tab has 'Ayarlari Kaydet' and 'Simdi Manuel Gonder' buttons
SMTP tab still works (all form fields present, save button works)
Reminder settings persist correctly after save
Reminder settings endpoints require admin authentication
Scheduler status endpoint requires admin authentication
critical_code_review_comments: JWT secret key warning persists: 'The HMAC key is 23 bytes long, which is below the minimum recommended length of 32 bytes' - consider using a longer JWT_SECRET in production

success_rate.backend: 100% (24/24 tests passed - 12 existing + 12 new reminder settings tests)

seed_data_creation: Reminder settings saved via API tests (days_before=7, send_on_due_date=true, is_scheduler_active=true)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FinTres Pro reminder settings feature fully functional. APScheduler runs at UTC 05:00 (= UTC+3 08:00 Turkish time). Scheduler status shows next_run in UTC+3 format. All 4 Settings tabs working: Profil, Kullanicilar, E-posta Ayarlari, Hatirlatma Ayarlari. SMTP test will fail (500) since credentials are fake - this is expected behavior.
